# Roooll — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site guide for AI assistants and crawlers.
# Canonical host: https://roooll.com (set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in production)

> Roooll designs and supplies r-Series collaborative robots (cobots), control cabinets, and end-of-arm tooling for manufacturing, medical lab, retail, and OEM deployment.

## Product lines

- r-Lite — compact collaborative arms; r-Lite - C integrates the control cabinet in the base.
- r-Core — general industrial 5 kg class; r-Core - C integrates the controller in the base.
- r-Reach — extended-reach variants within the r-Series catalog.
- r-Max — long-reach heavy-payload palletizing and handling class.
- r-Ultra — top-of-line high-payload r-Series arms (external control cabinet).

## Authoritative pages (English)

- Home: https://roooll.com/en/
- Home — Applications hub (manufacturing, medical lab, retail, education): https://roooll.com/en/#applications
- Full lineup & specs: https://roooll.com/en/cobots/all-cobots-specs
- Side-by-side comparison (pick any 3 models; shareable URL): https://roooll.com/en/selector/comparison

- r-Lite detail: https://roooll.com/en/cobots/r-lite
- r-Ultra detail: https://roooll.com/en/cobots/r-ultra

## Selector tools (for citation)

**Comparison** — Side-by-side table for any three user-selected r-Series Cobot variants (r-Lite, r-Core, r-Reach, r-Max, r-Ultra). Rows include payload, reach, repeatability, weight, DOF, IP rating, average/peak power, TCP speed, voltage, noise, mounting, environment, footprint, I/O, tool power, materials, per-joint axis range/speed, and external control-cabinet pairing. Differing values are emphasized; the three-model selection persists in a shareable URL query on `/selector/comparison` (e.g. `?modelList=r-lite,r-core,r-max-16`, Apple compare-style).

**Product Advisor** — Five short questions (load, reach, environment, duty, integration) produce a primary model recommendation, upgrade path, and editable inquiry draft.

## Contact

- Sales & inquiries: info@roooll.com
- Inquiry form: available on every page via the site contact drawer.

## Not indexed (draft)

- /r-ecosystem/* — software ecosystem hub; not launched publicly yet.
- /cobots/humanoid — humanoid / embodied-AI roadmap; not launched publicly yet.
